md: [Relevant background, files, source material, data, links, or constraints]
[Exact structure: bullets, table, JSON, patch, report, image specs, etc.]
- [How the agent should verify the result]
- [What must be true when the work is done]
xml: <context>[Relevant background, files, source material, data, links, or constraints]</context>
<output_format>[Exact structure: bullets, table, JSON, patch, report, image specs, etc.]</output_format>
<item>[How the agent should verify the result]</item>
<item>[What must be true when the work is done]</item>
toml: context = "[Relevant background, files, source material, data, links, or constraints]"
output_format = "[Exact structure: bullets, table, JSON, patch, report, image specs, etc.]"
"[How the agent should verify the result]",
"[What must be true when the work is done]"
constraints = "[Optional boundaries or things to preserve]"
examples = "[Optional sample output or style reference]"

md: [Files, components, issue, current behavior, logs, API, or existing code to use]
[Patch, plan, table, diff summary, commands, docs, screenshots, etc.]
- [Test, command, acceptance criterion, or observable behavior]
- [How to know the work is complete]
- Plan-first: [when to inspect and wait for confirmation]
xml: <scope>[Files, components, issue, current behavior, logs, API, or existing code to use]</scope>
<output_format>[Patch, plan, table, diff summary, commands, docs, screenshots, etc.]</output_format>
<item>[Test, command, acceptance criterion, or observable behavior]</item>
<item>[How to know the work is complete]</item>
toml: scope = "[Files, components, issue, current behavior, logs, API, or existing code to use]"
output_format = "[Patch, plan, table, diff summary, commands, docs, screenshots, etc.]"
"[Test, command, acceptance criterion, or observable behavior]",
"[How to know the work is complete]"
plan_first = "[Optional approval boundary for risky work]"

md: [Who uses this feature and what do they already know?]
- [How the agent/user verifies the feature is complete]
- Risks: [edge cases, dependencies, compliance, rollout concerns]
- Open questions: [unknowns to resolve before implementation]
[Spec doc, issue body, implementation prompt, or checklist]
xml: <target_users>[Who uses this feature and what do they already know?]</target_users>
<item>[How the agent/user verifies the feature is complete]</item>
<risks>[Optional risks, dependencies, compliance, or rollout concerns]</risks>
<output_format>[Spec doc, issue body, implementation prompt, or checklist]</output_format>
toml: problem_statement = "[What user/customer/business problem are we solving?]"
target_users = "[Who uses this feature and what do they already know?]"
"[How the agent/user verifies the feature is complete]"
risks = "[Optional risks, dependencies, compliance, or rollout concerns]"
open_questions = "[Optional unknowns to resolve before implementation]"
output_format = "[Spec doc, issue body, implementation prompt, or checklist]"

md: [Feature, product area, platform, repo, or user journey covered by these requirements]
- As a [user], I want [capability], so that [outcome].
- Performance: [latency, scale, reliability, accessibility, security, etc.]
- [Error state, empty state, permission issue, race condition, or unusual input]

"[Error state, empty state, permission issue, race condition, or unusual input]"
dependencies = "[Optional teams, APIs, migrations, or services]"

md: [Problem, feature spec, current architecture, and why a technical design is needed]
[Proposed design, boundaries, services/modules, sequence, and ownership]
- [Files, packages, services, APIs, schemas, jobs, queues, or UI areas]
- API changes: [contracts, endpoints, events, backwards compatibility]
[Backward compatibility, migration constraints, feature flags, versioning, or rollout concerns]
- [Tests, commands, observability, manual QA, load/security checks]
- Rollout plan: [phased launch or feature flag]
xml: <context>[Problem, feature spec, current architecture, and why a technical design is needed]</context>
<architecture>[Proposed design, boundaries, services/modules, sequence, and ownership]</architecture>

<compatibility>[Backward compatibility, migration constraints, feature flags, versioning, or rollout concerns]</compatibility>
<verification_plan>[Tests, commands, observability, manual QA, load/security checks]</verification_plan>
toml: context = "[Problem, feature spec, current architecture, and why a technical design is needed]"
architecture = "[Proposed design, boundaries, services/modules, sequence, and ownership]"
"[Files, packages, services, APIs, schemas, jobs, queues, or UI areas]"
data_changes = "[Schema, migration, storage, or retention changes]"

compatibility = "[Backward compatibility, migration constraints, feature flags, versioning, or rollout concerns]"
verification_plan = "[Tests, commands, observability, manual QA, load/security checks]"

md: [Feature/spec/design this plan implements, with repo/package/component boundaries]

- [External service, team, package, migration, data, or decision needed]

"[Concrete edit, migration, test, or documentation step]"
"[External service, team, package, migration, data, or decision needed]"

md: [Exact implementation task for the coding agent]

<item>Preserve [public API, data contract, UX, performance, security, behavior]</item>
<verification_plan>[Test command, lint command, manual check, or acceptance criterion]</verification_plan>
<output_format>[Patch plus summary, plan first, PR description, tests run, risks]</output_format>

source_spec = "[Link/paste feature spec, requirements spec, or technical design to follow]"
scope = "[Files, packages, services, components, or commands in scope]"
"Preserve [public API, data contract, UX, performance, security, behavior]",
verification_plan = "[Test command, lint command, manual check, or acceptance criterion]"
output_format = "[Patch plus summary, plan first, PR description, tests run, risks]"
